decision_point: In an adult with an unstable APC (open-book) pelvic ring injury and hemodynamic or mechanical instability, is surgical stabilization or nonoperative management preferred?
clinical_vignette:
Typical adult patient for whom this decision arises (no atypical comorbidities or contraindications).

Decision: In an adult with an unstable APC (open-book) pelvic ring injury and hemodynamic or mechanical instability, is surgical stabilization or nonoperative management preferred?
Options:
  1. Surgical stabilization
  2. Nonoperative management
label: settled
label_rationale: Restoring the ring reduces bleeding volume and enables mobilization.
